hero.title: GaonKa
hero.subtitle: Gaon Se Ghar Tak
hero.quote: “Real food. No preservatives. From villages you can trust.”

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Born from the fields of Bihar, GaonKa is a tribute to the honest, hardworking farmers who feed the nation. We bring you the produce exactly as it is prepared in our village kitchens.

whoNotFor.title: Who GaonKa Is Not For
whoNotFor.text: GaonKa is not for people looking for long shelf life or bulk discounts.

farmers.title: Meet The Hands
farmers.text: Real people. Real stories. The faces behind your food.

faqs.a: Because we sell only what comes from the current harvest and processing batch.
We pack after confirmation to avoid waste and unnecessary returns.
Farm-sourced food has real costs. We price it honestly.
